title: waltheria hoehnei
intro: Waltheria hoehnei, also known as the Brazilian Waltheria, is a plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae, native to Brazil. It is used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have health benefits, including reducing inflammation and relieving pain, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. Waltheria hoehnei is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to treat various health conditions, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
